feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Query on PageSize Property in S/4 HANA Public edition -- Business Partner Odata API
entry.content:
Dear All,

Good Day to Everyone

Is there a PageSize property available in S/4 HANA Public edition -- Business Partner Odata API ? Setting this property should return all the specified records from the system.

Regards

Rahul Jain

entry.title: How to add a custom tile from the Service Binding the preview link in eclipse ADT
entry.content:
In Eclipse ADT, I developed a custom business object, and created the Service Binding. The preview link in service binding is generaated and can display the app successfully (it's a simple list reporting app)

How do I have my end users access this app(e.g. by using "Custom Tiles APP") ? So far I see no options, even from https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/using-custom-tile-app-for-custom-development/qaq-p/12733154  i still do not see clear answers. Already check out the links inside it.

p.s. We use SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, and currently no license for SAP Business Application Studio.

Service binding preview linkApp previewSAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility  ABAP Development

entry.title: In-House Repair, Reject quotation, no outbound delivery created
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created an In-House Repair in SAP Public Cloud and did a customer return to receive the repair object. Then I created a repair quotation as follow up activity. I have rejected the quotation. According to SAP Help portal the system should create an outbound delivery after rejecting the quotation because the repair object has been received at the repair center. And it should set the repair object to complete. However by rejecting the quotation the status of the repair object stays in our case in status Quotation and there was no outbound delivery created. Also there is no option to trigger the outbound delivery by the Decide option.

Has anyone else experienced the same or do you have any hint why this could be? Thank you for your help.

entry.title: SAP公有云自动开票集成
entry.content: SAP公有云自动开票集成直连接口是不是只支持百望云？其他产品可以做自动开票集成吗？

entry.title: adobe form
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am doing initial research on adobe form.

Do we have any standard forms available for below forms.

bulk invoice print out
BIO Domestic/GTR/Export Invoice Printout
BII Invoice Print out

Let me know if you have designed any of this form.

Regards,

JP

entry.title: S4 HANA Public Cloud : How to create Fiori tiles for BTP -BPA form triggers for automations
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have built form trigger for a process automation that we have built on BTP -Build process automation, we are able to test the form trigger with the generated Url link for the form.

But how can we create a Fiori tile on S4 HANA public cloud Fiori launch pad for this BPA form  where the business users can have access to these tile and trigger the automations.

We have tried to create tile using Custom Catalog but question here is that we can give a static Url in the custom catalog app, but when the BTP sub account is different is for Dev and Prod environments then BPA form link will also be changing. in this case how can we create a Fiori tile which will dynamically points to the correct BPA form in all the environments ( Dev and prod).

SAP Build Process Automation  SAP Build SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Fiori

entry.title: Missing App Account Assignment References OTC Transactions - Substitution Rules
entry.content:
• An issue was encountered where the account assignment reference determination (OTC) transaction was missing.
• The "Account Assignment References" substitution rule field was disabled, preventing the addition of a target field.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Renumber G/L Accounts, mapping value is in Released mapping status
entry.content:
Mapping is in Released Status and is not proceeding further.
How to convert these G/L Accounts Numbers?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Code Text Reading Issue in SAP CDS View
entry.content:
Hello Guru!

In Custom Fields and Logic, custom Code and TEXT were added as shown below.
And I posted it with a custom code in the Accounting journal entry app. I also confirmed that the corresponding code was saved in the I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA table (CDS view).


In a custom development report that reads the I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA table (CDS view)
I want to read the text corresponding to the custom code.

It cannot be read because the API State is Cannot be set.

YY1_ACTIVITYCODE_W


Please help me with how to read the text of Custom Code.

thank you

Huny

entry.title: Which Communication Scenario can get Currency Exchange Rate data configured in SAP?
entry.content:
Hi，

I am configuring Odata API in SAP app: Communication Arrangements. I wan to get a table about Currency Exchange Rate , Which scenario include this data? Or is there a query facility for scenario?

Thanks~

entry.title: Posting date should be locked and future date should not be accepted in sap public cloud
entry.content: Does above will be possible in public cloud with validation or any other method? and If how I would get all details like which validations and customization are allowed in SAP PUBLIC CLOUD?

entry.title: Can I utilize an unsecured S/4 API (HTTP) to communicate between SAP BTP and the S/4 Public Cloud?
entry.content: Is there a way to enhance security between SAP BTP and the S/4 Public Cloud, such as hosting in a DMZ or using other methods?

entry.title: Form : bulk invoice print out
entry.content:
Hi All, 

What is Bulk invoice in Sales and do we have any standard form available in S4 Hana Public Cloud for this?

Regards,

Jagadhatri

entry.title: Edit an Interest rates instrument
entry.content:
How to edit a financial transaction in treasury management.

entry.title: Down payment clearing Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I'm trying to assign a down payment on a supplier invoice (through Create supplier invoice-advanced App) but i can't see the "down payment clearing" option.

 

I had the popup information which show there's down payment for the supplier, so i was expected to be able to add down payment information.

Could you please tell me if there any configuration activity to activate this option ? or if on Public cloud this option is no longer available ? 

 

Thanks for your help.

Best regards,

entry.title: Component scrap
entry.content:
Hi all,

we implemented Operational scrap in a routing and next step is setup Component scrap. We have also assembly scrap on SFG level, which should be overwritten by operational and component scrap.

Operational scrap is working correct, but my question is, if there is possibility to setup component scrap based on quantities in Operations.

Example:

quantity on order is 260, plus assembly scrap = 400

Also operational quantity is calculated correctly, is lower and lower in next step as process proceed

but component quantities are calculated from base quantity when production order was created(260pcs)

is there any possibility that component quantities will be calculated from reduced quantities?

thank you for your advice,

entry.title: Call dates in maintenance plans
entry.content:
Hi all,

could you please explain to me logic of dates in maintenance?

we have an issue that call dates are moving even if we dont make any changes, f. e. maintenance plans should be called on friday and starts on monday next week, but for some reason call date is moved to monday and then the whole plan is changed and moved to next day.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: App Aggregate Flows in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
App Aggregate Flows by Start Date is giving an error "No flows for aggregation under criteria specified. 0 flows aggregated".


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Build process Automation - How to execute automations with recorded screens in Background mode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,@Archana , @botazhat , @Chaitanya_Priya ,

We have a business use case to run the BPA automations to run in unattended mode which also in a background mode ( similar to Background jobs in SAP).

We have created an automation using screen capture option and recorded the Fiori app screens for asset distribution rules( App id : AIBU) on S4 HANA public cloud system, and we have created an process automation to read the data from a file and pass the data into this automation so that the bot can copy the data from file to the app AIBU and post the data in S4 system.

The automation is working fine end to end but its getting executed in fore ground in User machine on a browser window.

The question here is is it possible to schedule this automation as a background job in unattended mode so that this Job can run every day at given frequency and post the data in S4 system in AIBU application.

System details:

S4 HANA public cloud 2402

BPA desktop agent version: 3.24.54

Thanks a lot in advance.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAP s/4 public cloud CDS Basic Data Texts N
entry.content:
Hi folks, 
I am building a new SAP CDS View for material and I would like to know how I can grab the field "Basic Data Texts"

Regards,
